name: Guardrail or security review
about: Report guardrail, output-safety, or security concerns
title: "[Guardrail/Security]: "
labels: security, guardrail
assignees: ""
---

## Before posting

If this involves a sensitive vulnerability, use GitHub private vulnerability
reporting if available. Otherwise, open a minimal public issue without secrets,
tokens, private data, or sensitive exploit details. See `SECURITY.md`.

## Concern summary


## Affected area

- [ ] Source validation
- [ ] Company context
- [ ] Research gaps
- [ ] Ratios
- [ ] Valuation readiness
- [ ] DCF
- [ ] Fair value per share
- [ ] Model rating/confidence/signal
- [ ] Reports or summaries
- [ ] Audit logs
- [ ] Future adapter layer
- [ ] Other:

## Guardrail checklist

- [ ] Possible price target language
- [ ] Possible buy/sell/hold recommendation language
- [ ] Possible personal investment advice
- [ ] Possible broker/order or automated trading behavior
- [ ] Possible invented source or unsourced financial figure
- [ ] Possible unsupported live-data claim or fetch
- [ ] Possible framework-specific business logic in deterministic core

## Reproduction or evidence

Do not paste secrets or sensitive exploit details.
